channel.description: Recent content in HTML on yexca'Blog

item.title: HTML Learning Three - Web Layout
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Intro HTML Learning One - Basics: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/146 HTML Learning Two - Lists, Tables, and Forms: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/150 HTML Learning Three - Web Layout: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/195 Standard flow, also known as document flow, refers to the default arrangement rules for tags on a page. For example, block elements take up a full line, while inline elements can display multiple per …

item.title: HTML Learning Part Two - Lists, Tables, and Forms
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Introduction HTML Learning Part One - Basics: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/146 HTML Learning Part Two - Lists, Tables, and Forms: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/150 HTML Learning Part Three - Web Layout: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/195 Lists Lists are categorized into unordered, ordered, and definition lists. Unordered Lists unordered list -> list 1 2 3 4 5 <ul> <li>Item One</li> <li>Item Two</li> <li>Item …

item.title: HTML Learning Part One - Basics
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Intro HTML Learning Part One - Basics: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/146 HTML Learning Part Two - Lists, Tables, and Forms: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/150 HTML Learning Part Three - Web Page Layout: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/195 Basic Structure 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 <html> <head> <title>Webpage Title</title> </head> <body> Webpage Body </body> </html> Usually generated by software. For example, in VS Code, …
